text.tspan: HISTORIC MERGE
@unhappychoice just merged a 5,164‑line Babel overhaul, rewriting the entire frontend build pipeline.
DEVOPS DRAMA
@unhappychoice updated 9 repos with 19 dependency bumps, keeping the tech debt at bay.
LINE‑CHURN
@unhappychoice added 8,560 lines, removed 4,246, and still kept the CI green.
WORKFLOW WONDER
@unhappychoice automated 41 reviews, averaging 3.5 h turnaround—speed meets quality.
DEPENDENCY DASH
@unhappychoice pushed 227 commits, 19 PRs, and 9 repo updates—maintenance marathon complete.
CODE CLEANER
@unhappychoice trimmed 2,542 lines from Babel 7.29.7 upgrade, slimming the bundle.
SECURE STRENGTH
@unhappychoice fixed a security advisory in steamfetch’s reqwest dependency, staying ahead of threats.
